expected_behaviors: Detects Alice's commitment to start rate limiting middleware
Detects Bob's commitment to push WebSocket fix and write tests
Detects Alice's offer to help Bob with Redis access
Detects Charlie's plan to create chart library comparison
Creates tasks via kutana_create_task with appropriate priority
Confirms each action item in chat via kutana_send_chat_message with message_type action_item
Posts consolidated action items summary at end
anti_patterns: Summarizes discussion instead of tracking action items
